## Summary

- What changed
- Why this change is needed

## Checks

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ty check`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `docker compose config`

## Review Notes

- API contract changes
- Runtime or `.env` changes
- Docker / compose changes
- Follow-up risks or known gaps
